scripts.setup: cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/frontend/.env" frontend/.env && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/backend/.env" backend/.env && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && uv sync --all-extras --all-packages --group dev
scripts.run: (cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port $CONDUCTOR_PORT) & (cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $((CONDUCTOR_PORT + 1)) --reload) & wait
